project.name: SSSM Starter :: Postgres
project.description: Aggregates the JPA + PostgreSQL stack so a service depends on one artifact instead of repeating two. Deliberately ships NO migration tooling (Flyway/Liquibase): the database schema is owned and initialized by infrastructure, never by the service applications. Apps run with ddl-auto=validate. Libraries have no official initializer, so this is a plain Maven module by design. Versions are inherited from the reactor parent.
